text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I trained hard enough for that last
one.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I bet the audience was probably nodding off,
what with the race panning out just the way they
expected it to.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, never again. No more boring races.
choice_data_list: Have you hatched some kind of secret scheme?
Have you hatched some kind of secret scheme?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess you'll find out once the race starts!
